query:
SELECT 
  pv.id, 
  pv.variant_code, 
  pv.variant_name,
  pv.variant_type,
  pv.customer_id,
  c.name as direct_customer_name
FROM product_variants pv
LEFT JOIN companies c ON pv.customer_id = c.id
WHERE pv.variant_code LIKE 'DC-001-GRY%'
ORDER BY pv.id;

SELECT 
  vcl.variant_id,
  pv.variant_code,
  vcl.customer_id,
  c.name as customer_name
FROM variant_customer_links vcl
JOIN product_variants pv ON vcl.variant_id = pv.id
LEFT JOIN companies c ON vcl.customer_id = c.id
WHERE pv.variant_code LIKE 'DC-001-GRY%'
ORDER BY vcl.variant_id;
